mission.title: istio: Implement Gateway/Waypoint customization
mission.description:
Implements https://docs.google.com/document/d/13ZoxgR0CIaOuwyhA4xxI7L1XwsZaDVOmq13K8922zcU/edit?tab=t.0

Fixes https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/53964
Solves the use case for https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/53473 (but doesn't directly implement what they asked for)
Fixes https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/46594
Maybe resolves https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/54453 (not sure if you can _remove_ a port)
Fixes https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/53189
Fixes https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/55585

This PR implements customization of the Kubernetes Gateway controller. This means a `istio` or `istio-waypoint` Gateway object output can be customized.

There is a hierarchy of: `builtin defaults` < `GatewayClass` settings (new) < `Gateway` settings (new).

Users configure these via `ConfigMap` resources. The keys in the configmap represent each resource output.

For Gateway, they are referenced by `spec.infrastructure.parametersRef`.
For GatewayClass, we have a naming s

resolution.summary:
Skipping CI for Draft Pull Request.
If you want CI signal for your change, please convert it to an actual PR.
You can still manually trigger a test run with `/test all`
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: gateway
spec:
  infrastructure:
    parametersRef:
      group: ""
      kind: ConfigMap
      name: gw-options
  gatewayClassName: istio
  listeners:
  - name: default
    port: 80
    protocol: HTTP
---
apiVersion: gateway.networking.k8s.io/v1beta1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: echo
spec:
  parentRefs:
  - name: gateway
  rules:
  - backendRefs:
    - name: echo
      port: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: gw-options
data:
  horizontalPodAutoscaler: |
    spec:
      minReplicas: 2
      maxReplicas: 2

  deployment: |
    metadata:
      annotations:
        john-gw: hi
    spec:
      replicas: 4
      template:
        spec:
          containers:
          - name: istio-proxy
            resources:
              requests:
                cpu: 222m
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: istio-default-gatewayclass-istio
  namespace: istio-system
data:
  deployment: |-
    metadata:
      annotations:
        john-gwc: hix

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
spec:
  values:
    gatewayClasses:
      istio:
        deployment:
          metadata:
            annotations:
              john: hi
